top_signals.title: Japan’s 2026 wage talks result in third year of gains above 5%
top_signals.summary: Workers at 5,368 companies affiliated with Rengo, the country's largest labor union group, have secured an average wage increase of 5.01%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
